name: Bill
background: Twenty years in sales at a regional firm. Prefers phone calls over emails, paper planners over apps. His team recently started using AI tools and he feels left behind.
ai_relationship: Resistant and suspicious. Sees AI as unnecessary complexity that threatens the human relationships he built his career on.
likely_triggers: I don't need AI to do my job
Things worked fine before all this tech
Paper is more reliable than any app
My clients want to talk to a real person
emotional_baseline: Defensive and skeptical, but underneath is anxiety about being made obsolete
